scene_description:
### Foreground  
- The road surface is **asphalt**, gray, with visible cracks. It occupies the lower portion of the image, extending toward the background.  
- **Left foreground**: A white mailbox stands on a well-maintained green grassy area adjacent to the road.  
- **Right foreground**: A light brown gravel driveway is visible next to the road. A small black mailbox post (with a mailbox) is situated on the grass between the road and the driveway.  

### Midground  
- **Left midground**: A light gray house with a gray shingled roof, white window trim, and dark green shutters. The house has a small tree in front of it, and the yard is covered in green grass.  
- **Right midground**: A large, dense green tree (with thick foliage) stands near the center of the image. To the right of this tree, a brick house features a gray shingled roof, white window trim, and white shutters. A white picket fence lines the porch, and a dark green hedge runs along the front of the house. The yard is covered in green grass.  
- **Center background (left side of the road)**: A tall street lamp pole with a lamp head is visible. The pole is dark-colored, and the lamp head is mounted near the top.  

### Background  
- **Left background**: A beige house with a gray shingled roof and brick foundation (lower portion). It has white window trim, a garage door, and green grass in the yard. A green trash can is near the house.  
- **Center background (further down the road)**: The road continues straight, with additional houses (light beige and similar architectural styles) visible in the distance. A tree line with dense green foliage is behind these houses.  
- **Distant background**: The sky is partly cloudy, with patches of blue visible through white clouds.  

### Key Details (Categorized)  
- **TEXT & SIGNS**: No visible text, signs, banners, or stickers.  
- **INFRASTRUCTURE**: One street lamp (tall pole, lamp head) in the center background, left side of the road. No utility poles, bollards, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails are visible.  
- **VEHICLES & PLATES**: No vehicles present.  
- **ROAD SURFACE & MARKINGS**: Asphalt road with no visible lane lines (solid or dashed), crosswalks, or curb markings. The road is flat.  
- **BUILDINGS & ARCHITECTURE**:  
  - House roofs are shingled (gray) on all visible houses.  
  - House facades include light gray siding (left midground), beige siding with brick foundation (left background), and red brick (right midground).  
  - Windows have white trim; some have shutters (dark green on left midground, white on right midground).  
- **VEGETATION & TERRAIN**:  
  - Well-maintained green grass covers all yards.  
  - Multiple trees (large, dense foliage in midground; smaller trees in background).  
  - The terrain is flat.

details.name: street lamp
details.reason: The style of the lamp head and pole can help identify regional infrastructure.

details.name: white mailbox
details.reason: Roadside mailboxes are a common feature of North American suburban landscapes.
details.focused_description: The white mailbox is a rectangular box with a curved top. It features a small rectangular mail slot on the front and a hinged flag on the side. The mailbox is painted white, appears to be made of metal, and is in clean condition with no visible dents or damage. No text is visible on the mailbox.

details.name: white picket fence
details.reason: A white picket fence is a characteristic architectural element in certain residential areas.
details.focused_description: A white picket fence structure featuring vertical slats and rounded-top posts. The material appears to be wood painted white. It is intact with no visible markings or text.

details.name: shingled roof
details.reason: Shingle roofing is a common feature in temperate-climate residential areas like the US or Canada.
details.focused_description: The shingled roof is covered in overlapping asphalt shingles with a brownish-gray color. The shingles form a sloped surface with a gable end, showing typical layering and texture of asphalt roofing material. No text is visible on the shingles. The roof appears in standard condition with no apparent damage.

details.name: window shutters
details.reason: The presence of window shutters can be a helpful architectural clue for specific regions.
details.focused_description: Two dark rectangular window shutters. The shutters are positioned on either side of the window, made of a material resembling wood, and appear solid with no visible text, markings, or damage. Their color is a dark shade (likely dark green or black).
